heif.boxes

Class ItemLocationBox.ExtentData

  • java.lang.Object
    • heif.boxes.ItemLocationBox.ExtentData
  • Enclosing class:
    ItemLocationBox

    public static class ItemLocationBox.ExtentData
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents a single extent entry in the ItemLocationBox.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private long baseOffset  
      private int extentIndex  
      private long extentLength  
      private long extentOffset  
      private long offsetFieldFilePosition  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      long getAbsoluteOffset()
      Calculates the absolute file position of this extent.
      long getBaseOffset()
      Returns the base offset used for all extents in the parent item.
      int getExtentIndex()
      Returns the index of this extent, used when the item is indexed (i.e.
      long getExtentLength()
      Returns the size of this specific extent in bytes.
      long getExtentOffset()
      Returns the relative offset of this specific extent within the item's resource.
      long getOffsetFieldFilePosition()
      Returns the file position where the offset field itself was read.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Field Detail

      • extentIndex

        private final int extentIndex

        private final long extentOffset

        private final long extentLength

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExtentData

        public ExtentData(int extentIndex,
                  long extentOffset,
                  long extentLength,
                  long baseOffset,
                  long fieldPos)

    • Method Detail

      • getBaseOffset

        public long getBaseOffset()
        Returns the base offset used for all extents in the parent item.

        This value is added to each individual extent offset to find the absolute position in the resource.

        Returns:
        the base offset in bytes

      • getExtentIndex

        public int getExtentIndex()
        Returns the index of this extent, used when the item is indexed (i.e. in Version 1+).
        Returns:
        the extent index

      • getExtentOffset

        public long getExtentOffset()
        Returns the relative offset of this specific extent within the item's resource.
        Returns:
        the extent offset in bytes

      • getExtentLength

        public long getExtentLength()
        Returns the size of this specific extent in bytes.
        Returns:
        the length of the data block

      • getAbsoluteOffset

        public long getAbsoluteOffset()
        Calculates the absolute file position of this extent.

        This is the definitive location of the raw bytes, calculated as baseOffset + extentOffset.

        Returns:
        the absolute byte offset within the file

      • getOffsetFieldFilePosition

        public long getOffsetFieldFilePosition()
        Returns the file position where the offset field itself was read.
        Returns:
        the stream position of the offset field
